

**KOGI**  
Independent Worker Operating System

**HIGH-FIDELITY SCREEN FLOWS**

UX Design Specification Document

Confidential  ·  Version 1.0  ·  2025

| 15 screen flows  ·  8 platform modules  ·  Complete user journey documentation Auth  ·  Portfolio  ·  WBS  ·  Marketplace  ·  Exchange  ·  AI Agent  ·  Governance  ·  Studio |
| :---: |

**Prepared by the Kogi Product & Design Team**

|   DOCUMENT OVERVIEW Platform screen flow reference |
| :---- |

## **About This Document**

This document captures high-fidelity screen mockups for the Kogi Independent Worker Operating System. Each screen includes the full UI rendering, a description of the screen's purpose, key UI elements, and flow annotations showing how users navigate between states.

## **Screen Flow Groups**

* **Auth & Onboarding:** Login, registration, MFA, onboarding wizard

* **Dashboard:** Unified home view with portfolio health, AI suggestions, activity feed

* **Portfolio:** Hierarchical portfolio management — programs, projects, resources

* **Work Board (WBS):** Kanban board, sprint management, story detail, blockers

* **Marketplace:** Browse listings, listing detail, order flow, my listings

* **Exchange:** Wallet, transactions, invoices, escrow management

* **AI Agent:** Contextual chat, tool calls, suggested actions, history

* **Governance:** AO overview, proposals, voting, member management, treasury

* **Idea Studio:** Pipeline view, idea detail, validation, capture, IP timestamp

* **Analytics:** Revenue overview, OKR progress, marketplace performance

* **Profile & Settings:** Profile, availability, skill showcase, notification settings, billing

## **Design System**

* Color Palette: Navy (\#0F2D5E) primary, Sky (\#3B82F6) interactive, Teal (\#0D9488) secondary, dark background (\#0F172A)

* Typography: DejaVu Sans / Arial, size scale 10–28px, 5 weight levels

* Component Library: Cards, badges, tables, buttons, kanban cards, stat cards, progress bars

* Layout: 1440×900px viewport, 220px fixed sidebar, 56px topbar, 24px content padding

* Dark Mode: The platform defaults to a professional dark mode optimized for long work sessions

|   AUTH & ONBOARDING 4 screens |
| :---- |

**01\_login  Login**  ·  Auth & Onboarding

Primary sign-in screen supporting email/password and OAuth (Google, GitHub). Includes "Keep me signed in" toggle for 30-day session retention.

![][image1]

**Key Elements**

* **Left panel:** Brand value proposition with feature pills — shown to unauthenticated visitors as marketing surface

* **OAuth buttons:** Google and GitHub OAuth — fastest path to signup for technical users

* **Email input:** Auto-detects existing account vs new user; redirects to registration if email not found

* **Remember me:** Sets 30-day session cookie via secure httpOnly with CSRF protection

**User Flow:** User enters email → enters password → optionally enables MFA → lands on Dashboard. Failed login shows inline error; password reset triggers email flow.

**02\_register  Registration**  ·  Auth & Onboarding

New account creation with OAuth shortcuts, email/password form, and plan selection. Includes real-time password strength indicator.

![][image2]

**Key Elements**

* **Plan selector:** Free (no card) vs Pro (14-day trial) displayed at signup to capture high-intent users early

* **Password strength:** Real-time Argon2id strength estimation with 4-level visual indicator

* **Social proof:** "18,000+ independent workers" counter reinforces trust at conversion moment

**User Flow:** User chooses OAuth or email → fills name/email/password → selects Free or Pro plan → submits → receives verification email → lands on onboarding wizard.

**03\_mfa  MFA Verification**  ·  Auth & Onboarding

TOTP-based multi-factor authentication step. Required for wallet and financial operations regardless of session state.

![][image3]

**Key Elements**

* **6-digit input:** Individual digit inputs with auto-advance; accepts paste from authenticator app

* **Expiry timer:** 28-second countdown; code refreshes automatically on expiry without page reload

* **Progress dots:** Visual entry progress — fills as digits entered to confirm input is registering

**User Flow:** After password auth → TOTP code entry (6 digits, 30s window) → verified → Dashboard. Backup code path available for lost authenticator.

**04\_onboarding\_welcome  Onboarding — Welcome**  ·  Auth & Onboarding

First screen of the 4-step onboarding wizard. User selects their persona to personalize module visibility and initial workspace setup.

![][image4]

**Key Elements**

* **Persona cards:** Freelancer, Micro-Agency, Cooperative, Explorer — drives module defaults and onboarding content

* **Progress indicator:** 4-step stepper shows completion progress; users can jump back to earlier steps

* **Time estimate:** "Takes about 2 minutes" sets expectations and reduces abandonment anxiety

**User Flow:** Step 1: Persona selection → Step 2: Primary module activation → Step 3: Create first project → Step 4: Invite collaborators (optional) → Dashboard.

|   DASHBOARD 1 screen |
| :---- |

**05\_dashboard  Dashboard**  ·  Dashboard

The unified home view shown after login. Displays portfolio health, stat cards, active projects, activity feed, AI suggestions, and OKR snapshot.

![][image5]

**Key Elements**

* **AI welcome banner:** Proactive AI Agent surface — shows top 1 contextual action based on portfolio state

* **Stat cards:** 6 key metrics: projects, portfolio health, wallet balance, pending orders, OKR progress

* **Project health indicators:** Color-coded dots (green/amber/red) with At risk / On track / Off track badges

* **Activity feed:** Real-time event stream: AI actions, payments received, order completions, reviews

* **AI Agent panel:** Inline AI suggestions with one-click action buttons — avoids requiring full chat session

* **OKR snapshot:** 3 active OKRs with progress bars — clickable to drill into full OKR view

**User Flow:** Entry point after auth. AI banner → stat cards → project list → activity → AI panel → OKR cards. Quick actions: Ask AI, create item, view project.

|   PORTFOLIO 1 screen |
| :---- |

**06\_portfolio  Portfolio Overview**  ·  Portfolio

Grid view of all portfolio items — Programs, Sub-Portfolios, Projects, and Resources. Each card shows health score, financials, and story counts.

![][image6]

**Key Elements**

* **Color accent bars:** Gradient bars at card top represent the program's primary theme — customizable

* **Health score:** Portfolio health 0–100 computed from story completion rate, blocked count, and OKR progress

* **Financial summary:** Monthly revenue or resource value shown per item — links to Exchange transaction history

* **Resources card:** Aggregated view of assets, capital, licenses, and equipment across all items

* **Add card (dashed):** Always-visible creation affordance — opens type selector (Program, Project, Sub-Portfolio, Resource)

**User Flow:** Click card → Portfolio Item detail view. Click \+ → Create item modal. Toggle views: Grid / List / Map. Filter by type, status, or health.

|   WORK BOARD (WBS) 1 screen |
| :---- |

**07\_wbs\_board  Work Board — Kanban**  ·  Work Board (WBS)

Sprint kanban board for a single project. Columns: Backlog, In Progress, In Review, Done, Blocked. Story cards show type, assignee, points, and AI suggestions.

![][image7]

**Key Elements**

* **Sprint indicator:** Sprint number, date range, and risk badge in topbar — links to sprint planning view

* **Blocked column:** Dedicated Blocked column (not just a status) — prevents clutter in In Progress; AI auto-surfaces resolutions

* **AI suggestion pill:** Inline AI action on blocked stories — "Found 2 solutions in marketplace →" — one click resolves

* **Story type badges:** 30+ story types (feature, bug, blocker, review, docs, etc.) color-coded for visual scanning

* **Progress bars:** Inline mini progress bars on In Progress cards show sub-task completion percentage

**User Flow:** Story card drag-drop between columns updates status. Click card → Story detail. \+ Story → create inline or in modal. AI badge on blocked stories opens resolution suggestions.

|   MARKETPLACE 1 screen |
| :---- |

**08\_marketplace\_browse  Marketplace — Browse**  ·  Marketplace

Searchable marketplace with category sidebar, filters, and AI-personalized listing grid. Shows 4,200+ listings across 8 listing types.

![][image8]

**Key Elements**

* **Search hero:** Free-text search with category selector and popular search pills — most users land here first

* **Category sidebar:** Hierarchical categories with live listing counts — narrows results without page reload

* **Budget filter:** Dual-handle range slider with min/max inputs — shows count of matching listings dynamically

* **AI Match badge:** Blue border \+ "AI Match" badge on listings the AI recommends based on current blocked stories or OKRs

* **2.5% fee messaging:** "2.5% platform fee" shown prominently in search hero — differentiates Kogi from Upwork/Fiverr

**User Flow:** Search query / browse category → apply filters → click listing → Listing Detail → Place Order → Escrow created → Work delivered → Payment released.

|   EXCHANGE 1 screen |
| :---- |

**09\_exchange\_wallet  Exchange — Wallet**  ·  Exchange

Financial hub: wallet balance, quick actions (withdraw, deposit, send, invoice), transaction history, active invoices, and escrow panel.

![][image9]

**Key Elements**

* **Wallet hero:** Gradient hero card with large balance, 4 quick actions — highest-frequency financial interaction surface

* **KYC level indicator:** Shows current KYC level and what it unlocks (wire transfers, higher limits)

* **Transaction history:** Tabbed (All / Income / Expenses / Escrow) with type badges, running balance, and source links

* **Invoice urgency indicators:** Red \= overdue, Amber \= due soon — sorted by urgency to drive action

* **Escrow panel:** Active escrows with milestone progress bars — click to view details or release payment

**User Flow:** Deposit → KYC check → funds credited. Order complete → escrow released to wallet. Invoice created → client pays → wallet credited. Withdraw → bank transfer 1-2 days.

|   AI AGENT 1 screen |
| :---- |

**10\_ai\_agent  AI Agent Chat**  ·  AI Agent

Portfolio-aware AI assistant with a 3-panel layout: portfolio context sidebar, chat history, and input bar with quick actions.

![][image10]

**Key Elements**

* **Context sidebar:** Always-visible portfolio state: active projects (with health), wallet balance, OKR scores, suggested actions

* **Proactive suggestions:** 3 pre-computed suggestions on open (blocked stories, overdue invoices, at-risk OKRs) — shown before user types

* **Tool use transparency:** "Using: search\_marketplace, read\_wbs" shown inline as AI processes — builds trust through visibility

* **Action buttons in responses:** AI responses include confirm/reject action buttons — user always approves before execution

* **Quick action pills:** Pre-built intents: Plan sprint, Check OKRs, Create invoice, Search market — reduces friction for common tasks

**User Flow:** Open AI Agent → context panel auto-populates from portfolio → type or use quick action → AI uses tools → streams response with action buttons → user confirms or rejects actions.

|   GOVERNANCE 1 screen |
| :---- |

**11\_governance  AO Governance**  ·  Governance

Cooperative governance hub: active proposals with voting, member roster with stakes, treasury overview, and auto-execution status.

![][image11]

**Key Elements**

* **Cooperative header:** Member count, voting model, charter version, and real-time quorum status at a glance

* **Proposal cards:** Status-coded cards (Open, Passed, Draft) with vote counts, time remaining, and execution status

* **Vote bar:** Proportional For/Abstain/Against bar with required threshold marker — shows how far from passage

* **Auto-execution status:** Passed proposals show execution pipeline: Wallet created → Charter signed → Access granted

* **Member stakes:** Each member row shows equity stake percentage — clickable to view contribution history

**User Flow:** View proposal → cast vote (For / Against / Abstain) → vote recorded immutably → quorum check → proposal passes → auto-execution (wallet transfers, charter update, member onboarding).

|   IDEA STUDIO 1 screen |
| :---- |

**12\_idea\_studio  Idea Studio — Pipeline**  ·  Idea Studio

5-stage innovation pipeline (Capture → Validate → Design → Prototype → Launch) with idea cards, quick capture, and AI analysis.

![][image12]

**Key Elements**

* **Pipeline stage headers:** 5 stage cards show idea count per stage and highlight the active stage — clickable to filter

* **Validation score:** 0–100 composite score (TAM, WTP, survey responses) shown prominently on validated ideas

* **IP Timestamp badge:** Lock icon confirms blockchain timestamp — proves creation date for intellectual property purposes

* **Quick capture panel:** Right-side capture with category \+ model dropdowns and IP timestamp toggle — designed for fast ideation

* **AI idea suggestions:** AI suggests 2 ideas based on user portfolio, skills, and current market gaps — updated weekly

**User Flow:** Capture idea (text or voice) → Timestamp IP → Begin validation survey → Review scores → Advance stage → Create project \+ WBS from idea (Stage 5).

|   ANALYTICS 1 screen |
| :---- |

**13\_analytics  Analytics Overview**  ·  Analytics

30/90-day revenue analytics, marketplace performance table, OKR progress grid, and activity metrics.

![][image13]

**Key Elements**

* **Stat cards row:** 5 headline metrics with delta vs prior period — primary health indicators for the independent worker

* **Revenue bar chart:** Daily/weekly toggle; bars sized proportionally to daily revenue; hover shows tooltip with exact amount

* **Marketplace table:** Per-listing breakdown: views, orders, revenue, rating — sortable by any column

* **OKR progress grid:** 3-column OKR grid with progress bars, achieved amounts, and remaining targets

**User Flow:** Select date range → view revenue chart → drill into marketplace table → review OKR grid. Export CSV for external reporting.

|   PROFILE & SETTINGS 2 screens |
| :---- |

**14\_profile  Profile & Identity**  ·  Profile & Settings

User profile editor with identity, bio, availability settings, featured work showcase, and skill tags — controls the public marketplace profile.

![][image14]

**Key Elements**

* **Avatar with edit affordance:** Profile photo with overlay edit button — drag/drop upload or URL import

* **Availability widget:** Status, capacity (hrs/week), and rate — displayed on marketplace profile to attract relevant buyers

* **Featured work grid:** 3-slot portfolio showcase with \+ card — images link to full portfolio item detail

* **Skill tags:** Badges with category colors — used by marketplace AI for listing and talent matching

**User Flow:** Edit profile → preview public page → save. Changes reflect on marketplace listings immediately. Availability status change updates across all active listings.

**15\_settings  Settings**  ·  Profile & Settings

Account, security, billing, and platform settings. Left-nav organized into 4 sections: Account, Security, Billing, Platform.

![][image15]

**Key Elements**

* **Settings nav:** Left sidebar with 4 sections and 12 pages — active state highlighted in blue

* **Plan card:** Current plan summary with renewal date and AI credit allotment — upgrade CTA always visible

* **Notification matrix:** Per-category Email/Push/SMS toggles — granular control prevents notification fatigue

* **2FA status:** Green checkmark confirms 2FA active — click to manage backup codes or change authenticator app

**User Flow:** Navigate setting sections → make changes → save. Plan upgrade opens inline comparison modal. 2FA management opens wizard flow. Data export triggers async job.
